1.title: The Forest Feels Wrong
1.text:
The forest is too quiet.
Not even birds.
Something is off.

choices.result: You push deeper into the forest. The silence only gets heavier, like the trees are watching.
You voice concern and suggest turning back. The group hesitates, but keeps moving.
You scan the surroundings carefully. Nothing visible moves, but something still feels wrong.

2.title: Strange Tracks
2.text:
The hunt continues.
Silence sticks.
Even the hunters feel it.

Then, muddy stream.
Massive footprints.
Too big for anything normal.

Something passed here. Recently.

choices.result: You kneel by the tracks. The size isn't natural. Whatever passed here didn't care about leaving evidence.
You warn the group. The tension rises instantly, but everyone becomes more alert.
You move ahead alone. The forest feels closer when you're isolated.

3.title: First Contact
3.text:
Movement in the trees.

A massive lion-like creature steps out.
It locks onto you.

No warning.
No hesitation.
Just danger.

choices.result: You pull back with the group. For once, survival matters more than pride.
You step forward without hesitation. The creature reacts instantly.
You draw its attention. The group gets a window to move, even if it costs you.

secret_peaceful_event.title: Aftermath
secret_peaceful_event.text:
It works.
The group survives.
No chase.
No more threats.

The forest lets you go.

PEACEFUL_END.title: A Life That Stayed
PEACEFUL_END.text:
You chose to fall back.

Not out of fear. Out of understanding.

The hunt ended. The forest faded into routine.

The village moved on like nothing had changed.

And slowly, neither did you.

Work. Familiar faces. Quiet mornings.

The forest became a story people stopped telling.

Years passed without asking anything from you.

No glory. No ruin.
Just days that kept repeating.

One afternoon, you sat in your backyard.

Warm air. Still world.

And you stayed there.

No struggle.
No final thought.

Just silence that did not need to end.

3_5.title: Split Path
3_5.text:
Two paths.

Left: silent.
Right: disturbed.

Choose.

head_event.title: The Stranger
head_event.text:
The path stretches forward.

The forest is thinning now. Not fading. Ending.

Then... someone appears.

A man stands ahead on the road.

No armor. No weapon raised.
Clean clothes. Calm posture.
Like he belongs here.

He looks at you.

Noticing everything.
Your wounds.
Your weapon.
Your condition.

"…Interesting."

You tighten your grip instantly.

"Don't."

Calm voice. No threat.

"You're injured. Exhausted.
And days away from the nearest wilderness checkpoint."

He studies you.

"You don't know what that is."

Silence.

"You came through that?"

You nod.

"That shouldn't be possible."

He steps closer.

"What settlement are you from?"

You answer.

His expression changes.

"I've never heard of it."

Then—voices.
Distant. Many.
Human.

You freeze.

He turns toward the sound.

"Come with me."

A pause.

"Trust me."

"Whatever you think is out there… you're past it now."

He walks forward.

A town appears beyond the trees.

4.title: End of the Forest
4.text:
Hours pass.
Pain fades.
Trees thin.

Then—something impossible.

A path.
Made by humans.

You were lied to.

choices.result: You step onto the path. It feels too clean compared to everything you've known.
You slow down and study the surroundings. Someone has been maintaining this area.
You inspect the path carefully. This wasn't made by accident. It was maintained.

5.title: A World Beyond
5.text:
Trees end.

Then—buildings.
Not ruins.
Real ones.

People.
Noise.
Life.

Greyhaven.

The world is still alive.

choices.result: You take everything in. This place runs on rules you don't yet understand.
You focus on the people. They don't look like survivors. They look... normal.
You force yourself to act steady. No one here needs to see hesitation.

route_choice.title: Two Roads
route_choice.text:
Night in Greyhaven.

The Head watches the town.
Then you.

"You can stay."

"Or leave."

Simple choice.
Heavy consequences.

choices.result: You decide to stay. Not because it's safe, but because it's the first place that feels real.
You choose to leave. The unknown outside still calls louder than the town.

settler_recovery_event.title: A Place To Begin
settler_recovery_event.text:
Days pass.

The wounds from the forest slowly heal.

Greyhaven moves around you.

People work.
Children play.
Merchants argue.
Life continues.

No one treats you like a hero.
No one treats you like a threat.

Just another stranger trying to find a place.

The man who found you visits occasionally.

He answers some questions.
Avoids others.

Each answer only proves one thing.

The world is far larger than you were taught.

Eventually, the town grants you a small house near the edge of Greyhaven.

A bed.
A table.
A stove.

Nothing impressive.

But it is yours.

For the first time since leaving home, you sleep without fear.

A week later, the town healer finally clears you for work.

You spend the morning searching for opportunities.

Near the center of town stands a large wooden board covered in notices.

Job postings.
Requests.
Applications.

A new life has to start somewhere.

explorer_departure_event.title: Beyond Greyhaven
explorer_departure_event.text:
The decision surprises no one.

Not because people expected it.
Because few people care enough to stop you.

Greyhaven continues as it always has.

Merchants open their stalls.
Workers begin their routines.
Children race through streets that once seemed impossible to you.

Life moves forward.

A week ago, this town felt larger than the world.

Now it feels small.

Before leaving, you visit the Head one final time.

He studies you for a moment.

"Most people spend their lives searching for a place to stay."

His gaze drifts toward the eastern road.

"A few spend their lives searching for what lies beyond it."

Silence follows.

Then he hands you a folded map.

Old.
Worn.
Used.

The parchment stretches far beyond Greyhaven.

Roads.
Settlements.
Rivers.
Mountain ranges.

Places you've never heard of.

The kingdom is larger than anything you imagined.

Greyhaven sits near the far western edge.

A single dot among countless others.

"The world didn't end with your village."

"And it doesn't end here either."

The next morning, you leave.

No ceremony.
No farewell.

Just a road leading east.

For the first time in your life, no one knows where you'll be tomorrow.

Not even you.

6_settler.title: The Job Board
6_settler.text:
The board is larger than expected.

Dozens of notices cover the wood.

Some offer temporary work.
Others seek long-term employees.

For a moment, the number of choices feels overwhelming.

Back home, work was simple.
You hunted.
You gathered.
You survived.

Greyhaven is different.

People specialize.

They build entire lives around a single profession.

After reading through the postings, three opportunities stand out.

A librarian is seeking an assistant.

The town administration is looking for a clerk.

The treasury seeks an apprentice.

One choice could shape your new life.

choices.result: You take the library job. Quiet work, steady learning.
You join administration. Decisions flow through people like this.
You join the treasury. Trust is the real currency here.

6_explorer.title: The Open Road
6_explorer.text:
Days pass.

Greyhaven slowly disappears behind you.

The road stretches east.

Farmland replaces wilderness.

Small hamlets appear occasionally.

Travelers pass in both directions.

Most barely notice you.

A few offer greetings.

For the first time in your life, the world feels larger every day instead of smaller.

One afternoon, you reach a crossroads.

A weathered sign points toward several distant settlements.

You unfold the map the Head gave you.

The amount of land ahead is overwhelming.

You could spend years exploring it all.

For a moment, you stop walking.

Not because you're tired.

Because the realization finally settles in.

You are free to choose where this journey goes.

choices.text: Study the map and mark places worth investigating
choices.result: You begin studying routes, settlements, and landmarks. Every road tells a story.

choices.text: Talk with travelers about distant regions
choices.result: Most travelers enjoy sharing stories. Some sound impossible. Not all of them are.

choices.text: Take the longest route simply to see more of the world
choices.result: The efficient path isn't always the interesting one. You choose experience over speed.

job_selection_event.title: A New Routine
job_selection_event.text:
The application process is simple.

Within days, your new routine begins.

Greyhaven starts to feel familiar.

For the first time since leaving home, life stabilizes.

You are no longer surviving.
You are becoming part of something.

7_settler.title: First Days of Work
7_settler.text:
Your routine begins immediately.

Greyhaven doesn't wait.

You learn by doing.

People start recognizing you.
Not your story.
Just your presence.

You are inside the system now.

choices.result: You study records deeply. Patterns start forming faster.
You coordinate tasks. People begin listening naturally.
You track resources carefully. Mistakes drop quickly.

7_explorer.title: Roadside Rumors
7_explorer.text:
The farther east you travel, the busier the roads become.

Merchants.
Travelers.
Messengers.

Everyone seems to be heading somewhere.

At a roadside shelter, conversation drifts toward the same topic.

A merchant caravan is expected to pass through soon.

Some speak of valuable cargo.

Others speak of strange artifacts.

A few claim the merchant has spent years collecting unusual objects from across the kingdom.

Most of the stories sound exaggerated.

Then again, most stories do.

The next morning, you continue down the road.

Hours later, dark clouds gather overhead.

In the distance, you spot wagon tracks heading toward a narrow mountain pass.

The same route the merchant caravan was supposed to take.

choices.text: Study the rumors and compare different stories
choices.result: Most stories contradict each other. The interesting part is where they don't.

choices.text: Insert yourself into conversations and become the center of them
choices.result: People reveal more information when they want your attention.

choices.text: Keep moving despite the worsening conditions
choices.result: The road grows rough, but you endure it. Distance matters less than persistence.

settler_conflict_event.title: The Fence Line Dispute
settler_conflict_event.text:
Two neighbors argue near the edge of town.

A fence was repainted for the festival.

One claims the other crossed the property line.

A small issue.
But it’s already spreading attention.

People gather.
Watching.
Waiting.

Then they notice you.

The argument slows.
Not solved.
Just observed.

wagon_incident_event.title: The Broken Wagon
wagon_incident_event.text:
The storm arrives faster than expected.

Rain turns the road into mud.

Travelers begin seeking shelter wherever they can.

You continue forward.

Then you hear shouting.

A wagon has overturned near a narrow section of road.

Crates lie scattered across the mud.

One horse struggles against tangled harnesses.

Several travelers are already attempting to help.

At the center of the chaos stands an older merchant.

Drenched.
Covered in mud.
Still somehow giving orders.

The next hour becomes a blur.

Ropes are pulled.

Supplies are recovered.

The horse is freed.

The wagon itself survives, though barely.

By nightfall a small camp forms beside the road.

The merchant eventually approaches your fire carrying a wooden box.

Most people would've kept walking.

He sits across from you.

So I'd like to offer something in return.

He opens the box.

Inside rest three objects.

An old leather journal.

A silver signet ring.

And a wooden chicken.

You stare at the chicken.

The merchant notices.

Everyone does that.

He points to the journal.

Bought that from a ruin explorer years ago.

He claimed it was more valuable than gold.

Most of the pages are blank.

A strange symbol is burned into the cover.

The merchant then lifts the ring.

This belonged to someone important once.

No idea who.

But people tend to treat the wearer differently.

Finally he picks up the wooden chicken.

It rattles when shaken.

One leg is shorter than the other.

Don't underestimate the chicken.

Why?

The merchant pauses.

I honestly don't know.

Then why keep it?

Because every owner I've met refused to throw it away.

That answer somehow raises more questions than it solves.

The merchant places all three objects back into the box.

Take one.

Every traveler carries something.

The question is what kind of traveler you become.

8_settler.title: Festival Night
8_settler.text:
Greyhaven spends the day in preparation.

Streets are cleaned.
Lanterns are hung.
Stalls are built in silence that slowly turns into anticipation.

By evening, the town transforms.

The festival begins almost without warning.

Light floods the streets.
Music replaces conversation.
The same place you’ve been walking through suddenly feels unfamiliar.

Alive in a different way.

People move in celebration, but small issues still appear beneath the surface.
Nothing serious.
Just enough to notice if you're paying attention.

choices.text: Notice issues early and quietly fix them
choices.result: You pick up on small problems before they grow. The festival runs smoother without anyone knowing why.

choices.text: Step in and direct people to keep things running
choices.result: You start coordinating people without formal authority. Things fall into order under your direction.

choices.text: Join the crowd and help wherever needed
choices.result: You blend into the festival, helping where needed. For once, you're not watching from the outside.

8_explorer.title: The Merchant's Offer
8_explorer.text:
The storm has weakened.

Only the sound of rain remains.

The merchant leaves the box between you.

Three objects.

Three stories.

Perhaps three futures.

The journal waits silently.

The ring catches the firelight.

The chicken looks as ridiculous as before.

The merchant folds his arms.

Only one.

Choose carefully.

Or don't.

He seems equally entertained by either option.

choices.result: The cover feels older than it should. As your fingers touch the symbol, curiosity replaces hesitation.
The ring is surprisingly heavy. Whatever name it once carried has long been forgotten.

The merchant laughs.

I knew someone would eventually choose the chicken.

The chicken rattles mysteriously.

8_settler_event.title: Afterglow
8_settler_event.text:
The night settles slowly.

Lanterns dim.
Music fades into distance.
Streets grow quiet again.

But something lingers.

The festival didn't just happen around people.
It happened because of them.

And somehow, you were part of that system now.
Not outside it.
Inside it.

9_settler.title: The First Real Problem
9_settler.text:
Greyhaven's system doesn't stay calm for long.

A problem surfaces in your workplace.

Something small at first.
A missing record.
A misfiled document.
A delayed approval.

But it starts affecting other departments.

People begin asking questions.

And your name is attached to part of the chain.

choices.text: Fix it directly through your job role
choices.result: You dig into the records and correct the issue at its source. The system stabilizes quietly.

choices.text: Coordinate people to resolve it quickly
choices.result: You organize people across departments. The issue gets resolved faster, but it exposes weak points.

choices.text: Take responsibility and reassure everyone involved
choices.result: You step in calmly and take responsibility where needed. Trust in your role increases.

9_explorer.title: An Unusual Companion
9_explorer.text:
Morning arrives.

The storm has passed.

The merchant continues along his route.

You continue along yours.

The road stretches east once again.

Yet something feels different.

Not because the world changed.

Because you now carry something that wasn't yours before.

Several days pass.

Fields become hills.

Roads become trails.

Travel becomes quieter.

During a stop beneath an old stone marker, your attention drifts toward the item you chose.

For a moment, you wonder if the merchant knew more than he admitted.

choices.result: You spend hours studying the object. Every detail only creates more questions.

artifact_result.journal: The journal feels older than it should. While turning its pages, you discover a blank page that definitely wasn't there before.
artifact_result.ring: A tiny inscription is carved into the inner band of the ring. The language is unfamiliar, but the craftsmanship is unmistakably deliberate.
artifact_result.chicken: The wooden chicken rattles when shaken. You inspect it thoroughly. No compartment. No mechanism. Yet the sound remains.

choices.text: Ask travelers if they recognize it
choices.result: Most travelers shrug and move on. A few hesitate before answering.

artifact_result.journal: An elderly traveler sees the symbol on the cover and immediately loses interest in the conversation. He refuses to explain why.
artifact_result.ring: One merchant recognizes the ring instantly. Before you can ask anything, he apologizes and leaves without another word.
artifact_result.chicken: Several travelers laugh at the chicken. One of them stops laughing after looking at it closely and quietly advises you not to lose it.

choices.text: Keep moving and see where it leads
choices.result: Answers can wait. Roads have a habit of revealing things in their own time.

artifact_result.journal: That night, you wake to find the journal lying open beside your bedroll despite being packed away before sleep.
artifact_result.ring: Throughout the journey, strangers seem more willing to approach you than before. None explain why.
artifact_result.chicken: Near sunset, the chicken falls from your pack. You could swear it was secured moments earlier.

9_settler_event.title: After the Correction
9_settler_event.text:
The problem doesn't spread.

But it doesn't disappear either.

It gets recorded.
Tracked.
Analyzed.

Greyhaven doesn't forget who touched what.

Your involvement is now part of the system's memory.

Whether it was good or bad depends on what comes next.

10_settler.title: Evaluation Notice
10_settler.text:
You are called in unexpectedly.

Not for punishment.
Not for praise.

For review.

Greyhaven's system has been tracking your performance.
Your consistency.
Your decisions.
Your alignment with your assigned role.

Three departments are present in the evaluation.
Each one represents a different path you could have taken.

They don’t ask if you succeeded.

They ask how you function inside the system.

choices.text: Emphasize your technical accuracy and problem-solving
choices.result: Your precision is noted. Your ability to stabilize information systems is recognized.

choices.text: Highlight your coordination and decision-making impact
choices.result: Your ability to manage people and flow of decisions becomes your defining trait.

choices.text: Focus on reliability and trust within the system
choices.result: Your consistency and reliability become your strongest asset in their evaluation.

10_explorer.title: The Silent Waystation
10_explorer.text:
The road stretches onward for days.

The hills grow steeper.
The settlements become rarer.

Travelers pass less frequently now.

The kingdom feels larger with every step.

Then, near sunset, you spot stone rising from the landscape.

At first you mistake it for a ruined wall.

Then another appears.

And another.

A structure.

Old.
Abandoned.

Built beside a crossroads that no longer appears on any map you've seen.

The place should feel forgotten.

Instead, it feels patient.

The main building has partially collapsed.

Weather has worn away carvings.

Plants have reclaimed sections of the stone.

Yet signs of travelers remain.

Old campfires.
Footprints.
Supplies left behind.

People still come here.

Just not many.

Near the entrance stands a weathered plaque.

Most of the inscription has been destroyed.

Only a single line remains readable.

For those who seek beyond the known roads.

You read the words twice.

Something about them feels intentional.

As though the message was waiting for someone.

Waiting for anyone willing to keep walking.

Your gaze drifts toward the artifact you've carried since meeting the merchant.

For a brief moment, it almost feels connected.

Not to this place.

To whatever lies beyond it.

The evening grows darker.

You decide to investigate before continuing your journey.

choices.result: You spend hours examining the remaining carvings. Most are damaged beyond recognition, but fragments hint at routes and places no modern traveler seems to remember.

choices.text: Speak with the travelers resting nearby
choices.result: You spend the evening listening rather than searching. Every traveler tells a different story about the waystation, but all of them returned for a reason.

choices.text: Determine who benefits from this crossroads
choices.result: Roads shape kingdoms. Trade shapes roads. The more you observe, the clearer it becomes that influence travels farther than armies.
You navigate unstable passages most travelers avoid. Hidden paths reveal parts of the structure untouched for years.

choices.text: Endure the hazards and search every corner
choices.result: The search is exhausting. Dust, unstable floors, and endless dead ends test your endurance. You keep going long after most people would have stopped.

first_promotion_event.title: Promotion
first_promotion_event.text:
The review concludes.

The department recognizes your contributions.

Not because of a single achievement.

Because of consistency.

Months of reliable work have begun producing results.

Your supervisor presents the decision.

Additional responsibilities.

Greater authority.

A higher position within Greyhaven's system.

The promotion is not celebrated with speeches.

No crowd gathers.

No ceremony takes place.

Work simply continues.

Yet something has changed.

People now expect more from you.

And for the first time since arriving in Greyhaven, you are no longer considered new.

You have become part of the town's foundation.

second_promotion_event.title: Senior Appointment
second_promotion_event.text:
The decision takes longer this time.

The review involves multiple departments.

Reports.

Evaluations.

Recommendations.

Your name appears repeatedly.

Eventually the conclusion is reached.

You are offered one of the highest positions available within your profession.

The responsibility is significant.

Mistakes made at this level affect more than a single workplace.

They affect Greyhaven itself.

The appointment comes with authority.

Influence.

Expectations.

You think back to the stranger who first entered this town.

The person who knew nothing about the world beyond a forgotten village.

That person feels distant now.

Greyhaven is no longer a place you live in.

It is a place you help shape.

Whether that future succeeds or fails will depend partly on you.

class_event.title: The Old Cartographer
class_event.text:
The waystation isn't entirely abandoned.

As night falls, you notice an old man sitting beneath a damaged archway.

Maps cover the stone beside him.

Hundreds of markings.
Routes.
Notes.
Places.

He doesn't look surprised to see you.

Another traveler.

His eyes drift toward the artifact you're carrying.

Interesting.

You ask if he lives here.

He laughs.

No one lives here.

People pass through.

That's different.

Silence settles.

Eventually he rolls up one of his maps.

Most travelers think roads are what separate people.

They're wrong.

He points toward the crossroads outside.

Roads reveal people.

Follow enough of them and patterns appear.

His finger moves across several notes written on the map.

Some become Chroniclers.

People obsessed with recording what others overlook.

Another mark.

Some become Emissaries.

They connect strangers faster than roads ever could.

Another.

Some become Kingmakers.

Not rulers.

The people who decide who rules.

Another.

Some become Pilgrims.

The world rarely rewards them.

Yet somehow they outlast everyone else.

His finger stops at the final symbol.

And some become Pathfinders.

The people who walk where roads don't exist yet.

The old man studies you.

Not your face.

Your gear.
Your posture.
Your decisions.

Then he smiles.

The funny thing is...

Most travelers become one long before they realize it.

The fire crackles.

The crossroads stand silent beyond the darkness.

For the first time, you wonder what kind of traveler you've already become.

11_settler.title: Familiar Faces
11_settler.text:
Months have passed.

Greyhaven no longer feels unfamiliar.

People greet you by name.

Shopkeepers remember your orders.

Children wave when you pass.

The town has quietly accepted you.

Then a concern reaches the council.

Several families have recently arrived from smaller settlements.

Housing is becoming limited.

Resources remain stable.

Space does not.

The council begins discussing possible solutions.

Arguments form quickly.

Some want expansion.

Others want caution.

For the first time, people ask what you think.

choices.result: Greyhaven grows because people choose to come here. We should prepare for them.
Growth without planning creates problems later.
The people already here should not be ignored.

11_explorer.title: Fresh Ashes
11_explorer.text:
The Cartographer's directions lead you away from every marked road.

By midday you find it.

A ruined watchtower stands alone atop a hill.

Its upper floors have long since collapsed.

The entrance hangs open.

Someone has been here recently.

Ashes still glow faintly inside an old fireplace.

A rope hangs from a broken window.

Shelves have been emptied.

Books lie scattered across the floor, many with pages deliberately torn away.

Whoever searched this place wasn't looking for valuables.

They were looking for information.

Near the doorway, muddy footprints continue east.

You kneel beside them.

You're not the first person chasing whatever lies beyond the known roads.

You're following someone.

choices.text: Search the remaining books for overlooked clues.
choices.result: You carefully examine every damaged page. Whoever came before worked quickly. They missed more than they realized.

artifact_result.journal: One symbol burned into your journal perfectly matches a faded mark hidden inside a surviving book margin. Someone tried to erase it.
artifact_result.ring: Several pages mention an unnamed noble family whose crest resembles your ring, though the final pages have all been removed.
artifact_result.chicken: As you stack ruined books aside, the wooden chicken rattles loudly. Beneath the pile lies a page everyone else overlooked.

choices.text: Examine the campsite for signs of its previous occupants.
choices.result: The fire has only been out for a few hours. Whoever stayed here expected company but left in a hurry.

artifact_result.journal: Among the ashes you find a scrap reading, 'The journal still exists.' The remaining sentence has burned away.
artifact_result.ring: A discarded mug bears the same crest engraved on your ring. Someone here would have recognized it instantly.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken suddenly tips over beside an untouched bedroll. Hidden underneath is a small pouch containing dried provisions.

choices.result: Several people passed through. One clearly gave orders while the others followed without question.

artifact_result.journal: You notice someone paused repeatedly to compare the trail against notes written in a journal almost identical to yours.
artifact_result.ring: The bootprints suddenly split apart around yours, as though someone deliberately stepped aside after noticing the ring.
artifact_result.chicken: Small animal tracks repeatedly cross the larger footprints before vanishing. Oddly, every dangerous trail avoids them.

choices.text: Climb the ruined tower for a better view.
choices.result: The climb is dangerous, but the summit reveals roads stretching far beyond the horizon.

artifact_result.journal: Inside a cracked observation room you discover the same burned symbol carved into the stone windowsill.
artifact_result.ring: Hidden beneath loose masonry rests an ancient banner displaying the same crest as your ring.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken slips from your pack halfway up. Reaching for it prevents you from stepping onto rotten wood that immediately collapses.

choices.text: Remain until night and watch who returns.
choices.result: Hours pass in silence. The ruins grow colder, but patience often reveals what haste cannot.

artifact_result.journal: Moonlight reveals faint writing across one of the journal's blank pages. By dawn it has disappeared again.
artifact_result.ring: A hooded traveler approaches the tower, notices your ring from a distance, and quietly leaves without entering.
artifact_result.chicken: Long after sunset the chicken rattles on its own. Moments later you hear footsteps approaching, giving you just enough warning to remain hidden.

11_settler_event.title: The Head's Position
11_settler_event.text:
The Head attends the meeting.

He listens more than he speaks.

Eventually he makes a decision.

Expansion will begin slowly.

Controlled.

Measured.

Nobody leaves completely satisfied.

Yet nobody leaves angry either.

The Head notices you watching.

For a moment, it almost seems like he's evaluating you.

11_explorer_event.title: Someone Is Ahead
11_explorer_event.text:
Morning arrives beneath a grey sky.

The watchtower falls silent once more.

Before leaving, you discover something carved into the inside of the doorway.

Not a name.

Not a warning.

Just three words.

'You're still behind.'

The carving is fresh.

Whoever left it wanted the next traveler to read it.

You glance toward the eastern road.

The footprints continue.

So does your journey.

12_settler.title: Increased Responsibility
12_settler.text:
The expansion project affects every department.

Additional responsibilities appear.

Mistakes now carry larger consequences.

Your supervisor assigns you a task normally given to senior workers.

The assignment will directly affect Greyhaven's future plans.

choices.result: You personally verify every record and detail. Accuracy matters more than speed.
You coordinate communication across departments, keeping the project moving efficiently.
You ensure every resource allocation is accounted for and properly documented.

12_explorer.title: Echoes Beneath the Ruins
12_explorer.text:
The footprints lead you beneath the hills into a forgotten underground complex.

The air grows colder with every step.

Ancient stone walls surround a circular chamber unlike anything you've seen before.

Strange mechanisms line the room.

Most have long since rusted away.

One still hums quietly.

Your artifact suddenly reacts.

It pulls your attention toward hidden markings carved into the stone.

The chamber wasn't built to keep people out.

It was built to test those worthy of entering.

Somewhere beyond this room lies whatever your mysterious predecessor was searching for.

The mechanism slowly begins moving on its own.

You only have moments to decide how to proceed.

choices.text: Study the mechanism before touching anything.
choices.result: You patiently examine every moving piece until the mechanism's purpose becomes clear. Knowledge succeeds where haste would have failed.

artifact_result.journal: A faded sketch inside your journal perfectly matches the mechanism's hidden design. Whoever owned it had seen this chamber before.
artifact_result.ring: As your ring brushes the ancient stone, several hidden symbols illuminate across the walls, revealing instructions invisible moments earlier.
artifact_result.chicken: The wooden chicken suddenly rattles violently beside one loose stone. Removing it exposes a concealed locking mechanism.

choices.text: Allow your companions to help solve the chamber together.
choices.result: Everyone contributes a small observation. Alone none would have solved the puzzle, but together the answer becomes obvious.

artifact_result.journal: One companion recognizes a symbol copied inside your journal from an old legend their family once preserved.
artifact_result.ring: A companion quietly admits they've seen nobles wearing rings identical to yours, though never outside forgotten history.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken rolls toward one nervous companion, calming them enough to notice a hidden pressure plate everyone else overlooked.

choices.result: Your confidence keeps panic from taking hold. Every instruction is followed without hesitation as the chamber slowly awakens.

artifact_result.journal: The journal describes an ancient expedition leader whose decisions eerily mirror your own in this very chamber.
artifact_result.ring: The mechanisms respond almost respectfully once your ring becomes visible, as though recognizing forgotten authority.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken somehow ends up standing perfectly upright atop a control pedestal, drawing everyone's attention to the correct sequence.

choices.text: Push through the chamber's dangerous trial.
choices.result: Ancient defenses spring to life. Every step tests your endurance, but you refuse to retreat.

artifact_result.journal: Several blank pages suddenly fill with unfamiliar handwriting describing how previous explorers survived this exact trial.
artifact_result.ring: A volley of stone darts suddenly changes direction after striking your ring, leaving only shallow wounds behind.
artifact_result.chicken: The wooden chicken tumbles ahead of you, accidentally triggering nearly every trap before you reach them.

choices.text: Search for another path hidden within the walls.
choices.result: Tiny cracks reveal maintenance passages forgotten centuries ago. Precision uncovers what brute force never could.

artifact_result.journal: One page unfolds into a hidden map showing narrow maintenance tunnels omitted from every official blueprint.
artifact_result.ring: Your ring catches on an old stone lever disguised as decoration, opening a passage no one noticed.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken slips from your pack and disappears through a narrow gap. Following it leads directly into a hidden corridor.

12_settler_event.title: Notice
12_settler_event.text:
Your work succeeds.

Quietly.

Efficiently.

The kind of success that becomes invisible because nothing goes wrong.

The Head receives the final reports.

Your name appears among them.

Again.

12_explorer_event.title: The First Door
12_explorer_event.text:
The chamber falls silent.

One by one, the ancient mechanisms grind to a halt.

Dust drifts through the air.

Then a deep rumble shakes the stone beneath your feet.

Across the room, an enormous circular doorway slowly begins to rise.

No one speaks.

Beyond the opening stretches a corridor untouched by time.

Fresh footprints continue through it.

Whoever you've been following solved this trial before you.

Yet something else catches your attention.

The walls beyond the doorway are covered with strange carvings.

Not warnings.

Not history.

Names.

Hundreds of them.

Every explorer who reached this place carved their name into the stone.

Many continue no farther.

The carvings simply stop.

As though the corridor swallowed everyone who entered.

Your artifact grows warm.

Somewhere deeper within these ruins...

Something has finally noticed your arrival.

13_settler.title: Voices of Greyhaven
13_settler.text:
Greyhaven continues growing.

New workers arrive.

New merchants arrive.

New opinions arrive.

The town begins changing.

Some citizens welcome it.

Others fear losing what Greyhaven once was.

Arguments spread through taverns.

Markets.

Meetings.

No crisis exists.

Yet tension does.

choices.result: You listen carefully to both sides before forming conclusions.
You encourage discussion before disagreements become divisions.
You focus on maintaining stability while emotions run high.

13_explorer.title: The Hall of Names
13_explorer.text:
The corridor stretches farther than anyone expected.

The walls remain covered with names.

Thousands of them.

Some are carefully carved.

Others look as though they were scratched into the stone by trembling hands.

None continue beyond the end of the hall.

At its center stands an enormous stone archive.

Shelves filled with sealed tablets disappear into darkness.

Most remain untouched.

One pedestal stands empty.

Whatever belonged there was taken long ago.

Your artifact grows warmer with every step.

Someone removed more than an object.

They removed part of this place itself.

choices.result: The tablets describe expeditions spanning centuries. Every account ends at this archive.

artifact_result.journal: Your journal contains page numbers matching several missing tablets.
artifact_result.ring: A record identifies a forgotten bloodline carrying a ring identical to yours.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken tips over beside a cracked shelf, revealing a hidden tablet behind it.

choices.text: Work together to translate the inscriptions.
choices.result: Everyone contributes fragments until the forgotten language finally begins making sense.

artifact_result.journal: Your journal fills gaps in the damaged inscriptions.
artifact_result.ring: One companion recognizes your crest inside the carvings.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken's strange noises accidentally reveal a loose floor tile hiding additional inscriptions.

choices.text: Organize the expedition before moving deeper.
choices.result: Clear leadership keeps fear from spreading through the group.

artifact_result.journal: The journal speaks of leaders who vanished after reaching this chamber.
artifact_result.ring: The stone doors respond only after your ring is held forward.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken somehow blocks a collapsing stone slab before anyone is crushed.

choices.result: Dust explodes into the air as ancient stone finally gives way.

artifact_result.journal: A hidden compartment contains pages torn from your journal centuries ago.
artifact_result.ring: Your ring protects your hand from a deadly sealing mechanism.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken wedges into a crack, preventing the heavy door from crushing you.

choices.text: Search for hidden passages behind the archive.
choices.result: You discover maintenance corridors winding beneath the archive itself.

artifact_result.journal: A faded map inside the journal perfectly matches the hidden corridor.
artifact_result.ring: Your ring presses against a disguised lock that silently opens.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken rolls through a narrow gap, exposing the secret entrance.

13_settler_event.title: Rumors
13_settler_event.text:
Rumors begin spreading.

Nothing dangerous.

Nothing proven.

People claim the Head is planning something larger.

Expansion.

Political recognition.

Greater authority.

No one knows the truth.

Yet people continue talking.

13_explorer_event.title: The Missing Record
13_explorer_event.text:
One shelf remains empty.

Every nearby inscription has been deliberately erased.

Only a single sentence survives.

'The one who remembers shall never be remembered.'

Your artifact pulses.

Somebody didn't steal knowledge.

They erased an entire person from history.

14_settler.title: The King's Messenger
14_settler.text:
A royal messenger arrives.

The kingdom has finally noticed Greyhaven.

Reports of growth have reached the capital.

Recognition may soon follow.

The town celebrates.

Most people.

Not everyone.

The messenger requests private meetings with local leaders.

Including the Head.

Including you.

Questions are asked.

About growth.

About leadership.

About Greyhaven's future.

Something feels unusual.

Not wrong.

Hidden.

choices.result: You answer openly, believing honesty is the strongest foundation.
You choose your words carefully, aware that details can change outcomes.
You speak with confidence, presenting Greyhaven as a success story.

14_explorer.title: The Silent Observatory
14_explorer.text:
Beyond the archive rises an enormous circular chamber.

Broken lenses point toward a ceiling that no longer exists.

Ancient instruments continue moving without anyone touching them.

The stars above have changed.

Yet the machinery still follows patterns from another age.

Something here has been watching the world for centuries.

It never stopped.

choices.result: The observatory predicts events long before they occur.
Different viewpoints reveal patterns no individual could notice.

choices.text: Direct repairs to the ancient machine.
choices.result: The observatory slowly comes alive under your guidance.
The climb nearly kills you, but the view changes everything.
Perfect timing carries you safely through impossible obstacles.

judgment_event.title: Judgment
judgment_event.text:
The misunderstanding begins with paperwork.

Then conversations.

Then assumptions.

Reports sent to the capital contain contradictions.

Statements become distorted.

Words lose context.

The messenger believes the Head is consolidating power.

Some citizens believe the Head intends to replace local council authority.

Others believe the kingdom intends to seize control of Greyhaven.

Nobody possesses the full truth.

Yet everyone believes they do.

The town divides.

Not into enemies.

Into interpretations.

Meetings become arguments.

Arguments become accusations.

For the first time since arriving in Greyhaven, uncertainty spreads through every street.

Then the messenger delivers a formal notice.

A final review will determine Greyhaven's future status.

The Head becomes the center of the controversy.

And somehow...

So do you.

14_explorer_event.title: An Impossible Sky
14_explorer_event.text:
The machine finally stops.

Every lens turns toward you.

For a single moment the ceiling disappears.

You do not see today's sky.

You see stars that have not existed for thousands of years.

Then everything returns to normal.

The observatory wasn't watching the heavens.

It was remembering them.

15_settler.title: Final Responsibility
15_settler.text:
The review approaches.

The town remains tense.

Work continues anyway.

It always does.

Your department receives one final critical assignment.

Failure could damage Greyhaven's position.

Success could strengthen it.

Everyone is watching.

choices.result: Facts should decide this.
People need direction before they need answers.
A town survives because people trust each other.

15_explorer.title: The Keeper's Trial
15_explorer.text:
At the observatory's center stands a lone stone figure.

It has no face.

No weapon.

No inscription.

As you approach, every artifact begins reacting at once.

The statue slowly raises one hand.

The trial has begun.

Not of strength.

Of worth.

choices.result: You search for understanding before acting.
You place people above certainty.
You accept responsibility without hesitation.
You endure what others cannot.
You trust movement over words.

head_conflict.title: The Head's Decision
head_conflict.text:
The final review takes place in the council hall.

Citizens gather.

Department leaders gather.

The royal messenger arrives carrying the kingdom's judgment.

The Head stands before them all.

Calm.

Unmoved.

The accusations are repeated.

Some claim Greyhaven has grown beyond its place.

Some claim the Head has gathered too much authority.

Others claim the kingdom simply fears an independent town.

For hours, arguments fill the hall.

Then the messenger presents a solution.

Greyhaven may receive official recognition.

But only if significant authority is transferred away from the Head and placed under direct royal oversight.

The room falls silent.

The decision would protect Greyhaven's future.

But it would also change the town forever.

For the first time, the Head turns toward you.

'You've lived among these people.'

'You've seen this town grow.'

'Tell them what should happen.'

choices.result: Systems should survive individuals. Greyhaven's future must be protected, even if change is required.
Leadership built this town. Trust should not be discarded because of rumors and fear.
Greyhaven was built through cooperation. The answer should unite people, not divide them.

15_explorer_event.title: Judgment
15_explorer_event.text:
The stone figure lowers its hand.

The chamber falls completely silent.

Your artifact shines brighter than ever before.

Something ancient studies every decision you've made since leaving civilization.

Not your victories.

Not your failures.

Your choices.

A voice echoes through the ruins.

'Every path leaves its mark.'

The trial is complete.

16_explorer.title: The Engine Below
16_explorer.text:
The hidden passage descends deeper than any map could have predicted.

The air grows warmer.

The stone beneath your feet changes.

The ancient blocks become smooth metal unlike anything crafted today.

At the end of the tunnel stands a chamber so vast your torch cannot reveal its ceiling.

An enormous structure rests at its center.

Countless rings surround a motionless core.

Thousands of engraved symbols cover its surface.

No rust.

No decay.

Only silence.

Your artifact suddenly reacts.

For a brief moment, the entire chamber vibrates.

A faint light travels across the machine before fading once more.

Whatever this place truly is...

It has not died.

It has merely been sleeping.

choices.result: Ancient symbols begin revealing fragments of a forgotten language unlike anything recorded.

artifact_result.journal: Several symbols perfectly match unfinished sketches inside your journal.
artifact_result.ring: The machine briefly glows whenever your ring nears its surface.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken lands beside a loose panel, exposing hidden inscriptions underneath.

choices.text: Work together to inspect the surrounding mechanisms.
choices.result: Careful teamwork uncovers maintenance paths surrounding the enormous machine.

artifact_result.journal: Your journal helps identify markings that safely guide the expedition.
artifact_result.ring: The ring prevents one mechanism from activating unexpectedly.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken rolls beneath exposed gears, revealing a concealed access hatch.

choices.result: The expedition remains calm as everyone follows your direction through the chamber.

artifact_result.journal: Several diagrams describe leaders assigned to oversee the machine.
artifact_result.ring: Your ring is recognized by ancient sensors before anyone else notices.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken distracts everyone long enough for you to prevent a dangerous mistake.

choices.result: Every step feels heavier as invisible energy fills the chamber.

artifact_result.journal: The journal's pages briefly glow before returning to normal.
artifact_result.ring: The ring shields you from a sudden burst of energy.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken bounces harmlessly into the energy field while you remain untouched.

choices.text: Search for the machine's power source.
choices.result: Hidden maintenance tunnels reveal how impossibly vast the structure truly is.

artifact_result.journal: A forgotten maintenance route perfectly matches a rough sketch inside your journal.
artifact_result.ring: The ring unlocks a concealed maintenance door.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken slips into a narrow opening, exposing a hidden passage.

16_explorer_event.title: The Sleeping Heart
16_explorer_event.text:
Without warning, your artifact pulses.

The dormant machine answers.

Ancient rings slowly begin turning.

Light races across symbols untouched for centuries.

The entire chamber trembles.

Then...

Silence.

Whatever awakened only lasted a few seconds.

But it was enough.

Something deep beneath the ruins has noticed your arrival.

17_explorer.title: The Forgotten Purpose
17_explorer.text:
Beyond the machine lies an untouched archive.

Unlike every record before, these tablets remain complete.

Hours of translation slowly reveal the impossible.

The civilization whose ruins cover the land did not build the machine.

They inherited it.

Generation after generation they served as its guardians.

Their greatest cities existed for only one purpose.

Maintenance.

Protection.

Containment.

Every monument.

Every law.

Every sacrifice.

All dedicated to ensuring one thing beneath the earth never awakened.

Your expedition has misunderstood these ruins from the very beginning.

choices.result: Each completed tablet fills another gap in humanity's forgotten history.

artifact_result.journal: Entire passages appear where blank pages once existed.
artifact_result.ring: The ring's crest is listed among the ancient guardians.
artifact_result.chicken: A loose tablet hidden beneath the chicken completes the final translation.

choices.text: Share the discovery with the expedition.
choices.result: Fear gives way to determination as everyone finally understands their mission.

artifact_result.journal: Your journal helps convince the others the records are genuine.
artifact_result.ring: The ring becomes undeniable proof of the archive's claims.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken's familiar absurdity briefly eases the expedition's growing tension.

choices.text: Assume responsibility for the expedition's next decision.
choices.result: Everyone looks to you before taking another step.

artifact_result.journal: Ancient leaders recorded the same burden you now carry.
artifact_result.ring: The ring silently confirms your authority.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken somehow keeps morale from collapsing during the debate.

choices.result: The abandoned quarters still contain signs of the civilization's final days.

artifact_result.journal: One final diary matches the handwriting inside your journal.
artifact_result.ring: The ring opens a chamber untouched since the civilization vanished.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken uncovers hidden supplies left by the last guardians.

choices.text: Search for evidence of the civilization's downfall.
choices.result: Subtle clues reveal that the guardians never truly failed by accident.

artifact_result.journal: Your journal highlights symbols pointing toward the final chamber.
artifact_result.ring: The ring reacts near a sealed emergency passage.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken finds a concealed switch no one noticed.

17_explorer_event.title: Inheritance
17_explorer_event.text:
One final inscription remains.

'We were never its creators.

Only its keepers.

When we are gone...

Another must take our place.'

For the first time, the expedition realizes the ruins were never meant to preserve history.

They were waiting for successors.

18_explorer.title: The Price of Silence
18_explorer.text:
The deeper chambers no longer sleep.

Doors begin opening on their own.

Ancient lights illuminate forgotten halls.

Machines awaken one after another.

Stone guardians slowly shift where they have stood for centuries.

The archive never activated because of time.

It activated because of you.

Every step.

Every discovery.

Every artifact.

Together they have restarted the ancient complex.

Far ahead, an enormous sealed gateway begins moving.

The sound echoes through the ruins.

Something beyond it is waiting.

choices.result: Patterns emerge showing the entire complex functions as one enormous mechanism.

artifact_result.journal: The journal predicts each activation moments before it happens.
artifact_result.ring: Your ring identifies control symbols hidden among the machinery.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken lands on a pressure plate that safely reveals another mechanism.

choices.result: Panic spreads quickly, but steady leadership keeps everyone moving together.

artifact_result.journal: Your journal contains reassuring notes left by earlier explorers.
artifact_result.ring: The ring calms fears as the group recognizes its significance.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken somehow makes everyone laugh during the worst possible moment.

choices.result: Quick decisions prevent chaos as ancient systems continue activating.

artifact_result.journal: The journal records emergency procedures nearly identical to your own commands.
artifact_result.ring: The ring grants access to a secure command platform.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken distracts an awakening guardian long enough for everyone to escape.

choices.result: The expedition endures collapsing pathways to stay ahead of the awakening complex.

artifact_result.journal: The journal reveals a safer escape route moments before disaster strikes.
artifact_result.ring: Your ring absorbs a dangerous surge of energy.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken's unexpected detour saves you from falling debris.

choices.text: Reach the great gateway before it fully opens.
choices.result: Swift movement carries you across ancient bridges as the ruins come alive.

artifact_result.journal: The journal marks hidden shortcuts toward the gateway.
artifact_result.ring: The ring unlocks barriers that would otherwise slow the expedition.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken discovers a maintenance path leading directly to the gate.

18_explorer_event.title: The First Alarm
18_explorer_event.text:
The gateway opens only a few feet.

That is enough.

A deep tone echoes throughout the entire complex.

Every dormant machine answers.

The lights brighten.

The guardians awaken.

For the first time in centuries...

The ancient system declares an intruder.

The final path now lies before you.

There is no returning the ruins to silence.

19_explorer.title: The Final Seal
19_explorer.text:
The gateway now stands before the expedition.

Its doors tower over every monument you've encountered.

Thousands of interlocking rings cover its surface.

Each slowly turns as ancient mechanisms awaken beneath the earth.

Beyond the narrow opening lies only darkness.

The guardians did not build this place to keep people out.

They built it to keep something inside.

Your artifact grows warmer.

The gateway answers.

Symbols race across the stone.

One by one, enormous locks begin releasing.

The expedition falls silent.

No one questions what comes next.

Whatever waits beyond this seal has waited longer than history itself.

choices.text: Study the locking mechanisms before opening the gate.
choices.result: Every mechanism reveals remarkable engineering far beyond modern understanding.

artifact_result.journal: Your journal contains diagrams matching the gateway's intricate design.
artifact_result.ring: The ring identifies symbols marking the gateway's original builders.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken lands atop a loose stone, exposing an overlooked locking mechanism.

choices.text: Prepare the expedition for what lies ahead.
choices.result: Confidence replaces fear as everyone commits to crossing the threshold together.

artifact_result.journal: The journal recounts guardians placing their trust in one another before the final passage.
artifact_result.ring: The ring reassures the expedition that they have reached the correct path.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken somehow eases the growing tension with its familiar absurdity.

choices.text: Lead the expedition to the gateway.
choices.result: No one hesitates as you take the first step toward the ancient seal.

artifact_result.journal: The journal speaks of one chosen to lead the final descent.
artifact_result.ring: The gateway acknowledges your ring before anyone else approaches.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken unexpectedly avoids a hidden pressure plate that would have delayed the expedition.

choices.text: Place your hand upon the ancient seal.
choices.result: A surge of ancient energy courses through the gateway as it accepts your presence.

artifact_result.journal: The journal's final blank page briefly fills with glowing symbols.
artifact_result.ring: The ring shields you from the gateway's overwhelming energy.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken remains perfectly calm despite the violent tremors around it.

choices.text: Search for another entrance before opening the gate.
choices.result: Every hidden passage ultimately leads back to the same colossal gateway.

artifact_result.journal: Your journal confirms there has never been another path.
artifact_result.ring: The ring quietly guides you back toward the true entrance.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken wanders into a forgotten corridor that circles back to the gateway.

19_explorer_event.title: The Chosen Key
19_explorer_event.text:
Your artifact begins to shine.

The gateway answers.

Massive locks disengage one after another.

Ancient gears roar back to life.

Dust falls from the ceiling as the enormous doors slowly separate.

The path ahead illuminates for the first time in centuries.

The expedition finally understands.

The artifact was never a relic.

It was always meant to open this place.

The final chamber now awaits.

20_explorer.title: Beyond the Threshold
20_explorer.text:
Beyond the gateway lies absolute silence.

The chamber stretches beyond the reach of your torch.

Ancient machines line the walls.

None are damaged.

None are abandoned.

Everything still functions exactly as intended.

At the chamber's center stands a single platform surrounded by countless records.

Their message is unmistakable.

The guardians never destroyed what they sealed.

They only delayed its return.

The burden was never theirs alone.

One day another would arrive.

One day another would choose.

A final doorway slowly begins to open.

Cold air pours from the darkness beyond.

Whatever waits there has been expecting someone.

choices.result: The final records reveal that every generation sacrificed itself to preserve the seal.

artifact_result.journal: Your journal's missing pages complete themselves with the guardians' final testimony.
artifact_result.ring: The ring is identified as a symbol of those entrusted with the final decision.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken uncovers one last hidden record overlooked for centuries.

choices.text: Stand beside your companions before moving forward.
choices.result: No one speaks. The silence alone is enough to strengthen everyone's resolve.

artifact_result.journal: A final entry reminds every guardian that no burden should be carried alone.
artifact_result.ring: The ring glows softly as the expedition stands united.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken settles quietly beside the group, breaking the unbearable silence.

choices.text: Accept responsibility for what comes next.
choices.result: The ancient systems recognize your decision without hesitation.

artifact_result.journal: The journal names those who once stood where you now stand.
artifact_result.ring: The ring activates the platform at the center of the chamber.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken confidently walks toward the final doorway before anyone else.

choices.text: Step toward the opening despite the danger.
choices.result: Every instinct warns you to stop, yet you continue forward.

artifact_result.journal: The journal's final sentence simply reads: 'Do not fear the truth.'
artifact_result.ring: The ring protects you as invisible energy surrounds the doorway.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken crosses safely, proving the path itself is not the danger.

choices.text: Inspect the final chamber before entering.
choices.result: Careful observation reveals that every mechanism points toward the final doorway.

artifact_result.journal: The journal confirms there are no remaining secrets behind you.
artifact_result.ring: The ring reveals the safest route across the chamber.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken discovers a hidden bridge leading directly to the final entrance.

20_explorer_event.title: No Turning Back
20_explorer_event.text:
The expedition crosses the threshold.

Without warning...

The gateway behind you closes.

The sound echoes throughout the ancient complex.

Every path back disappears.

One final inscription slowly appears upon the stone.

'Those who walk beyond this point shall decide the fate of all who follow.'

The darkness ahead begins to stir.

The final journey has begun.

21_explorer.title: The Forgotten Warden
21_explorer.text:
The darkness ahead slowly begins to breathe.

Heavy footsteps echo through the endless chamber.

One.

Then another.

Ancient lights awaken one by one.

A colossal figure emerges from the shadows.

Stone plates cover its body.

Golden veins pulse beneath countless cracks.

Its eyes remain closed.

It does not attack.

It simply waits.

The final guardian still carries out the command it was given thousands of years ago.

No weapon is raised.

No words are spoken.

Only a single inscription appears before you.

'Prove that this age deserves the truth.'

choices.result: Every symbol carved into the guardian matches the records left by the ancient civilization.

artifact_result.journal: Your journal reveals notes describing the guardian's original purpose.
artifact_result.ring: The ring resonates with the guardian as though recognizing an old companion.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken discovers faded symbols hidden beneath the guardian's massive foot.

choices.result: The guardian remains perfectly still, acknowledging your decision without hostility.

artifact_result.journal: A forgotten entry explains that trust once prevented countless wars.
artifact_result.ring: The ring emits a gentle glow that causes the guardian to lower its head.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken confidently approaches the guardian, breaking the overwhelming tension.

choices.result: Your voice echoes across the chamber as the guardian silently considers your resolve.

artifact_result.journal: The journal lists every individual who once stood before the guardian.
artifact_result.ring: The ring projects an ancient crest recognized by the guardian.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken proudly stands beside you as though supporting your declaration.

choices.result: The guardian's overwhelming presence fails to shake your determination.

artifact_result.journal: Your journal records one final lesson: courage is measured by conviction.
artifact_result.ring: The ring shields you from the guardian's immense aura.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken remains completely calm despite the impossible pressure.

choices.text: Search for the guardian's hidden weakness.
choices.result: Careful observation reveals the guardian was designed to judge, not destroy.

artifact_result.journal: The journal identifies several mechanisms hidden beneath the guardian's armor.
artifact_result.ring: The ring reveals an ancient seal embedded within the guardian's chest.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken slips behind the guardian, exposing a concealed passage.

21_explorer_event.title: The Final Trial Begins
21_explorer_event.text:
The guardian slowly opens its eyes.

Ancient light fills the chamber.

It studies every member of the expedition.

Then...

It kneels.

The entire chamber trembles.

The path beyond begins to open.

One final message echoes throughout the ruins.

'The seal has endured.

Now let your hearts be judged.'

Beyond the opening...

Something far older than the guardian awakens.

22_explorer.title: The Chamber of Truth
22_explorer.text:
The guardian remains kneeling behind you.

The newly opened passage leads into a chamber unlike any before it.

There are no machines.

No weapons.

No defenses.

Only countless crystal pillars stretching endlessly into darkness.

Within every crystal...

Lives unfold.

Entire civilizations rise.

Entire civilizations fall.

You witness wars.

Peace.

Discovery.

Extinction.

Every possible future exists before your eyes.

At the center of the chamber floats a single crystal.

Unlike the others...

It shows your own world.

Its future has not yet been decided.

choices.result: Each vision teaches that every decision shapes countless unseen consequences.

artifact_result.journal: The journal fills with impossible events that have yet to occur.
artifact_result.ring: The ring pulses differently beside every crystal you approach.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken repeatedly stops before the same crystal as though sensing something important.

choices.result: You refuse to face the endless visions alone, strengthening everyone's resolve.

artifact_result.journal: A forgotten passage reminds future guardians that truth is easier to bear together.
artifact_result.ring: The ring glows brighter whenever your companions stand nearby.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken gathers everyone around the central crystal.

choices.text: Accept the responsibility of choosing humanity's future.
choices.result: The central crystal begins responding only to your presence.

artifact_result.journal: The journal recognizes you as the next keeper of the final choice.
artifact_result.ring: The ring projects an ancient symbol above the crystal.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken quietly watches as though waiting for your decision.

choices.result: An overwhelming surge of memories floods your mind, yet you endure every vision.

artifact_result.journal: Its pages remain untouched despite the immense energy surrounding you.
artifact_result.ring: The ring shields your body from the crystal's overwhelming power.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken pecks the crystal once before casually stepping away.

choices.text: Inspect the chamber before making any decision.
choices.result: Hidden markings reveal that the chamber itself is one final test.

artifact_result.journal: A concealed diagram explains how each crystal records an entire civilization.
artifact_result.ring: The ring reveals invisible pathways between the crystal pillars.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken uncovers a hidden inscription beneath the central platform.

22_explorer_event.title: The Chosen Future
22_explorer_event.text:
The central crystal begins to crack.

One by one...

Every surrounding vision disappears.

Only your world's future remains.

A distant heartbeat echoes throughout the chamber.

Not your own.

Not the guardian's.

Something far below has sensed the crystal's awakening.

The floor slowly opens.

A staircase descends into absolute darkness.

The final truth waits below.

23_explorer.title: The Origin
23_explorer.text:
The staircase descends deeper than any civilization should have reached.

No walls.

No ceiling.

Only darkness.

At its end...

A single sphere of pale light floats above an endless abyss.

It is impossibly small.

Yet every ancient machine.

Every guardian.

Every seal.

Was built around it.

As you step closer, countless voices begin whispering together.

Not in anger.

Not in fear.

But in sorrow.

The ancient civilization never imprisoned a monster.

They imprisoned something that once protected the world.

And humanity forgot why.

choices.result: Fragments of forgotten history finally reveal why the seal was created.

artifact_result.journal: The journal's final blank pages fill with the world's true history.
artifact_result.ring: The ring projects memories recorded thousands of years ago.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken discovers an overlooked memory crystal beneath the platform.

choices.result: You believe the ancient protectors acted with reasons long forgotten.

artifact_result.journal: A final testimony speaks of faith surviving even after history fades.
artifact_result.ring: The ring shines softly as though approving your decision.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken quietly rests beside the sphere without fear.

choices.result: The chamber recognizes your willingness to inherit humanity's responsibility.

artifact_result.journal: The journal records your name beside every guardian before you.
artifact_result.ring: The ring accepts you as the next bearer of the ancient oath.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken stands proudly at your side as the chamber responds.

choices.text: Approach the sphere despite the danger.
choices.result: The unbearable pressure threatens to crush you, yet you continue forward.

artifact_result.journal: Its pages remain untouched despite the immense energy surrounding the sphere.
artifact_result.ring: The ring shields you from the sphere's overwhelming presence.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken casually circles the sphere as if nothing is unusual.

choices.text: Search for the sphere's true purpose.
choices.result:
Careful inspection reveals the sphere was never a prison.
It was a choice waiting for someone worthy.

artifact_result.journal: Hidden diagrams explain the sphere's original function.
artifact_result.ring: The ring reveals ancient mechanisms hidden beneath the abyss.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken scratches away loose stone, uncovering the final inscription.

23_explorer_event.title: The Last Keeper
23_explorer_event.text:
The sphere slowly descends.

The abyss begins to glow.

An ancient figure rises from the light.

Neither human.

Nor machine.

It opens its eyes.

'I have waited...'

Its voice echoes across the endless chamber.

'...for the one who would decide whether this world still deserves its future.'

The final judgment has begun.

24_explorer.title: Humanity's Judgment
24_explorer.text:
The ancient keeper watches without expression.

No weapon rests in its hands.

No throne stands beneath it.

Only countless lights drift through the endless chamber.

Each light carries a memory.

Every act of kindness.

Every betrayal.

Every discovery.

Every war.

The keeper raises one hand.

The lights gather around you.

'Your journey is not what is being judged.'

'Humanity is.'

'You are merely its witness.'

The memories begin surrounding you.

Each one asks the same silent question.

Was this world worth saving?

choices.result: You recall every discovery and sacrifice that allowed civilization to endure.

artifact_result.journal: Every page shines as the journal records humanity's finest moments.
artifact_result.ring: The ring projects visions of civilizations rising through wisdom instead of war.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken stops beside memories filled with hope rather than conflict.

choices.result: You believe people can still choose compassion over fear.

artifact_result.journal: The journal reveals countless ordinary people whose kindness changed history.
artifact_result.ring: The ring glows brighter with every memory of unity.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken wanders between the lights, drawing forgotten memories together.

choices.text: Accept humanity's failures as your own.
choices.result: You refuse to blame those who came before, accepting responsibility for what comes next.

artifact_result.journal: The final entry reminds every future leader that responsibility cannot be inherited without action.
artifact_result.ring: The ring recognizes your resolve and burns with ancient light.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken quietly remains beside you as the keeper observes your choice.

choices.result: You witness humanity's darkest moments without turning away.

artifact_result.journal: The journal survives the overwhelming flood of memories untouched.
artifact_result.ring: The ring shields your mind as countless voices echo around you.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken somehow remains asleep despite the impossible pressure.

choices.text: Search for the truth behind every memory.
choices.result: You realize every memory has been shown without judgment, only truth.

artifact_result.journal: Hidden writing appears, revealing no history was ever erased, only forgotten.
artifact_result.ring: The ring uncovers one final concealed memory hidden from every previous visitor.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken scratches away dust, revealing the keeper's original oath.

24_explorer_event.title: The Final Door
24_explorer_event.text:
The keeper closes its eyes.

Every floating memory slowly disappears.

The endless chamber grows silent.

Then...

A single doorway appears.

Unlike every door before it...

It bears no lock.

No seal.

No guardian.

Only one inscription.

'The final choice belongs not to us...'

'...but to the one who stands here now.'

The keeper steps aside.

Beyond the doorway...

The fate of the world awaits.

25_explorer.title: The Final Choice
25_explorer.text:
Beyond the doorway lies nothing.

No chamber.

No sky.

No ground.

Only endless white.

The ancient keeper remains behind you.

It will not follow.

A single pedestal rises before you.

Upon it rests a sphere of pure light.

It is neither alive...

Nor lifeless.

Within it exists every possible future.

The fate of humanity has never belonged to gods.

Nor guardians.

Nor ancient civilizations.

It has always belonged to the one willing to choose.

The keeper speaks one final time.

'There is no correct answer.'

'Only consequences.'

The sphere slowly descends into your hands.

choices.result: You believe stability is worth preserving, even if change must wait.

artifact_result.journal: The journal records the beginning of humanity's next chapter.
artifact_result.ring: The ring accepts the burden carried by every guardian before you.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken quietly settles beside the fading light.

choices.text: Entrust humanity with its own future.
choices.result: You believe people deserve the freedom to shape their own destiny.

artifact_result.journal: Its final page remains blank, waiting for humanity to write it.
artifact_result.ring: The ring's ancient glow slowly fades, its duty complete.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken confidently walks toward the unknown future.

choices.text: Accept the burden as the world's new guardian.
choices.result: You willingly inherit the responsibility abandoned by history.

artifact_result.journal: Your name becomes the final entry in its endless record.
artifact_result.ring: The ring seals itself around your hand forever.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken refuses to leave your side.

choices.result: Some burdens should never be carried again.

artifact_result.journal: Every page turns blank as the old history comes to an end.
artifact_result.ring: The ring cracks before dissolving into light.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken watches silently as the ancient light disappears.

choices.result: You reject every path laid before you and choose to forge your own.

artifact_result.journal: The journal begins writing pages that never existed before.
artifact_result.ring: The ring transforms into something even the guardians never imagined.
artifact_result.chicken: The chicken happily wanders into the unwritten future.

settler_scholar_ending.title: The Scholar of Greyhaven
settler_scholar_ending.text:
The review eventually concludes.

The misunderstanding fades.

The rumors disappear.

The truth proves less dramatic than the stories people told.

Greyhaven receives recognition from the kingdom.

Life moves forward.

As years pass, your reputation grows.

Not as a leader.

Not as a politician.

As a source of knowledge.

Records improve under your guidance.

Systems become more efficient.

Future generations learn from information you helped preserve.

People seek your advice before making important decisions.

Not because you hold authority.

Because your understanding has earned respect.

When newcomers arrive in Greyhaven, they find a town built upon lessons learned rather than mistakes repeated.

And hidden within countless records and decisions lies your influence.

Quiet.

Invisible.

Enduring.

You left home searching for a future.

You found it in understanding.

Ending Unlocked:
The Scholar of Greyhaven

settler_leader_ending.title: The Voice of Greyhaven
settler_leader_ending.text:
The crisis eventually passes.

Recognition is granted.

The town survives.

But people remember who stood forward when uncertainty spread.

Your name appears often in those memories.

Years pass.

Greyhaven continues growing.

New districts appear.

New opportunities emerge.

New challenges follow.

Again and again, people look toward you.

Not because they must.

Because they choose to.

You become one of the town's most respected leaders.

Someone capable of bringing people together when opinions divide them.

Someone willing to make difficult decisions when others hesitate.

The Head eventually steps aside.

Time reaches everyone.

But Greyhaven never lacks direction.

A new generation carries the town forward.

And your influence remains part of its foundation.

You left home searching for a place to belong.

You found it among people.

Ending Unlocked:
The Voice of Greyhaven

settler_community_ending.title: The Heart of Greyhaven
settler_community_ending.text:
The review concludes.

The arguments fade.

The town heals.

Not because everyone agrees.

Because people choose to move forward together.

Years pass.

Greyhaven grows steadily.

Children become adults.

Families expand.

New faces arrive.

Old faces disappear.

Through it all, one thing remains constant.

You.

You never seek authority.

You never chase recognition.

Yet nearly everyone knows your name.

The shopkeepers.

The workers.

The families.

The people who quietly keep Greyhaven alive.

When disputes arise, people trust you.

When celebrations begin, people invite you.

When difficult times arrive, people rely on you.

Not because of your position.

Because of your character.

Greyhaven becomes more than a town.

It becomes a community.

And in countless ways, you helped make that possible.

You left home searching for somewhere to live.

You found a place to call home.

Ending Unlocked:
The Heart of Greyhaven

ending_knowledge_lost_journal.title: The Final Chronicle
ending_knowledge_lost_journal.text:
You preserve the ancient order.

The world never learns what truly rested beneath its foundations.

The forgotten chambers are sealed once more.

The guardians become nothing more than myth.

Only one record survives.

The Lost Journal.

Its final pages are no longer blank.

They now contain the complete history of the ancient civilization.

Their sacrifices.

Their mistakes.

Their hope.

You spend the rest of your life safeguarding that knowledge.

Never as a ruler.

Never as a hero.

But as history's final witness.

Long after your passing...

The journal waits for the next soul worthy enough to read the truth.

ending_knowledge_silver_ring.title: The Last Guardian
ending_knowledge_silver_ring.text:
You preserve the ancient order.

The Silver Ring recognizes your decision.

Its ancient power accepts you as the successor to every guardian before you.

The hidden complex awakens once more.

Its machines begin another endless watch.

The world above continues unaware.

Peace remains.

Not because danger disappeared...

But because someone chose to bear it.

Generations come and go.

Your name is forgotten.

Yet beneath the earth...

The Last Guardian never abandons the watch.

The seal endures.

Because you do.

ending_knowledge_chicken.title: The Quiet Tomorrow
ending_knowledge_chicken.text:
You preserve the ancient order.

The chambers fall silent once again.

The ancient keeper offers a final nod before fading into light.

Nothing spectacular follows.

No statues are built.

No songs are written.

You simply return home.

The chicken faithfully follows beside you.

Years pass.

Children laugh.

Harvests flourish.

The world continues without ever knowing how close it came to losing everything.

Perhaps that is how true heroes are remembered.

Not through glory...

But through the ordinary tomorrows they quietly protect.
