ending_trust_lost_journal.title: The Shared Truth
ending_trust_lost_journal.text:
You entrust humanity with its own future.

The ancient order comes to an end.

The hidden chambers are opened.

The Lost Journal is no longer hidden from the world.

Its pages reveal every triumph.

Every failure.

Every sacrifice made by the civilization that came before.

People argue.

Some reject the truth.

Others embrace it.

But for the first time...

Humanity is allowed to learn from its own past.

Knowledge is no longer guarded.

It is shared.

The future belongs to everyone.

ending_trust_silver_ring.title: The Broken Oath
ending_trust_silver_ring.text:
You entrust humanity with its own future.

The Silver Ring grows dim.

Its purpose has finally ended.

There will be no more guardians.

No secret keepers.

No hidden protectors.

The ring crumbles into silver dust before disappearing forever.

The burden carried across thousands of years is finally lifted.

Humanity now stands alone.

Its future will no longer be decided by ancient promises.

Only by its own choices.

ending_trust_chicken.title: A World Worth Trusting
ending_trust_chicken.text:
You entrust humanity with its own future.

The ancient keeper smiles for the first time.

Without another word...

It vanishes.

The hidden world slowly fades into history.

You leave the ruins with nothing except your companions...

And the chicken faithfully walking beside you.

Life continues.

Kingdoms rise.

People laugh.

Children play.

The future is uncertain.

But perhaps uncertainty was never something to fear.

It was simply proof that the world finally belonged to those living in it.

ending_influence_lost_journal.title: The Eternal Record
ending_influence_lost_journal.text:
You accept the burden as the world's new guardian.

The Lost Journal opens one final time.

Your journey becomes its last written chapter.

Then...

It begins writing once more.

Not about the past.

But about the future.

Every generation that follows.

Every great leader.

Every terrible mistake.

The journal continues recording history through your eyes.

Though the world never knows your name...

Its story is never again forgotten.

The Chronicle continues.

Because you chose to remain.

ending_influence_silver_ring.title: The Successor
ending_influence_silver_ring.text:
You accept the burden as the world's new guardian.

The Silver Ring seals itself upon your hand.

Its ancient light burns brighter than ever before.

The keeper bows.

Its duty has finally ended.

Now...

It belongs to you.

The forgotten complex awakens under your command.

Its guardians answer only to your will.

You become the silent protector of humanity.

Watching.

Waiting.

Ensuring that the mistakes of the past are never repeated.

Your name fades from history.

But your watch has only begun.

ending_influence_chicken.title: The Unlikely Guardian
ending_influence_chicken.text:
You accept the burden as the world's new guardian.

The ancient keeper nods in approval.

The hidden world becomes your responsibility.

Every machine.

Every seal.

Every forgotten secret.

You remain beneath the earth while the world above continues unaware.

Only one companion refuses to leave.

The chicken settles beside the ancient throne.

Days become years.

Years become generations.

Travelers sometimes speak of hearing quiet clucks echoing from forgotten ruins.

No one believes the stories.

Perhaps that is for the best.

Every guardian deserves at least one loyal friend.

ending_hp_stat_lost_journal.title: The Final Sacrifice
ending_hp_stat_lost_journal.text:
You destroy the ancient power forever.

The sphere shatters.

The hidden complex begins collapsing.

The Lost Journal falls into your hands.

Its pages slowly fade.

One by one...

Every record of the ancient civilization disappears.

Their history.

Their achievements.

Their mistakes.

All are erased.

Some knowledge was never meant to survive.

You escape the ruins as the last chamber crumbles into darkness.

The world is safe.

But the truth is gone forever.

Only you remember what was sacrificed.

ending_hp_stat_silver_ring.title: The Broken Legacy
ending_hp_stat_silver_ring.text:
You destroy the ancient power forever.

The Silver Ring begins to crack.

The ancient keeper closes its eyes.

Its purpose has ended.

The ring shatters into countless fragments.

Across the hidden complex...

Every machine powers down.

Every guardian falls silent.

The age of ancient protectors ends forever.

The burden carried across thousands of years finally comes to rest.

You leave the ruins carrying nothing.

Because nothing remains to carry.

ending_hp_stat_chicken.title: The Last Sunrise
ending_hp_stat_chicken.text:
You destroy the ancient power forever.

Light consumes the endless chamber.

The keeper smiles peacefully before disappearing.

The ancient city collapses behind you.

The world above never learns what happened beneath its feet.

As the first sunrise breaks across the horizon...

The chicken hops onto your shoulder.

You laugh.

For the first time since entering the ruins.

The danger is over.

No more guardians.

No more ancient burdens.

Only a new day.

And a world finally free to write its own future.

ending_skill_lost_journal.title: The Unwritten Age
ending_skill_lost_journal.text:
You reject every path laid before you.

The ancient keeper watches in silence.

Then...

It smiles.

For the first time in thousands of years.

The Lost Journal opens.

Its pages begin tearing themselves free.

One by one.

Until nothing remains.

No prophecy.

No history.

No destiny.

Only blank pages.

You carry them back into the world.

Not as a record of what was...

But as an invitation for humanity to write what comes next.

The future is no longer remembered.

It is finally unwritten.

ending_skill_silver_ring.title: Beyond the Guardians
ending_skill_silver_ring.text:
You reject every path laid before you.

The Silver Ring glows brighter than ever before.

Then...

It changes.

The ancient crest disappears.

The power once used to preserve the past becomes something entirely new.

The hidden complex awakens.

Not to defend.

Not to imprison.

But to build.

The keeper bows.

'You have surpassed those who came before us.'

The age of guardians ends.

The age of pioneers begins.

For the first time...

Humanity walks toward the future instead of hiding from it.

ending_skill_chicken.title: The Path Nobody Expected
ending_skill_chicken.text:
You reject every path laid before you.

The ancient keeper laughs.

A sound the forgotten chambers have not heard in ages.

'Every soul before you chose one of the roads we prepared.'

'You are the first to simply walk away.'

The endless white fades.

The ruins remain.

The world remains.

But the future is no longer bound by ancient choices.

You leave the hidden city with your companions.

The chicken happily races ahead.

There is no prophecy waiting.

No guardian watching.

No destiny demanding to be fulfilled.

Only an open road.

And a future that belongs to those willing to create it.
